textByHash.06f343f94e0ce029b6966f1d3fd5803963bcd460: Oh, great, that would be really helpful! Here, give me the axe for safe keeping and I'll get it sharpened as soon as she agrees to help.
textByHash.18698f487c315f6688612015fc8dd880865de998: Yeah, it is, but it shouldn't be. It was only a harmless pub brawl but he got caught up in it and they just jailed everyone.
textByHash.1a0b590c7c9e9e0b605be456df28d60e8a9e3e9b: Well, come back if you need any help with it, we may be able to work something out.
textByHash.29f4202eebab8e43399cadfd63beed431410ef98: Well, yes, if you wouldn't mind? Aggie the witch is a family friend and she's a pillar of the local community.
textByHash.3321787dfd8a9c5ce38186e28502251c8411d4fd: But I'm a bit preoccupied at the moment. I'm worried that my friend is going to spend the rest of the year behind bars!
textByHash.347917b1709011820f029486505a9a73391094f4: You don't have any blunt axes on you!
textByHash.34ad607585e00f1bc25b63395ab08f16a138c6c0: Okay. Fare well on your travels.
textByHash.4dfab5eb466d11466d0bb689b342e2d7b009a488: Well, I'd like to. I really would, but I wouldn't be able to concentrate while worrying about my friend so much. I tell you what. If you could do me just one small favour, I promise to help you!
textByHash.698bb9edd72c14432b8650411d6b03a3a88f91b9: Except he says he's going to run away to the wilderness if he's found guilty and you know what blood-hungry scum inhabit those realms.
textByHash.6f03dbc5ceda9b17c18d2469959a25481c2959d8: Hmm, well you could try your luck in Lumbridge at Bob's Axes, though I've no clue if he offers this kind of service.
textByHash.89c055e1f9be45b8268e5ea0d2ae8e918350c60f: Yep, take a look at these great axes!
textByHash.90248205db0ce174e50319e3db4824100394a8fa: I know you wouldn't think it would you! Could you ask her if she'll act as a character witness for my friend?
textByHash.a62626029b5754a3b9ffadfeb0185eef01d00060: You know what, normally I do...but...
textByHash.a915e8e7ea78938bf1df00023551832f44a3d6b7: He always seemed very focused on selling axes to blood-hungry killers keen to explore the wilderness.
textByHash.bc2b287ee8043d064fe6c2a8e9c921f434d3cc90: Oh, please. It would mean such a lot to me! Just ask Aggie if she'll be a character witness for my friend. She only lives in Draynor Village. It'll only take you a few minutes!
textByHash.c18672058b3205d019d22bff105a13d624be1b7f: Go talk to Aggie and ask her if she'll be a character witness for my friend before he finds himself in jail with less than savoury people...or worse, he runs off to the wilderness!
textByHash.c315a847d22b754a2323387e146ba1499ae097fa: Would you like to buy some archery equipment?
textByHash.d24f95b8ef75a549bf88822af1f4ad3ac1bb762f: Here you go, here's your axe! And very many thanks for your help and a good laugh! You should have seen your face! Oh what a picture!
textByHash.e186fe8f03316169a5542f6ce51a264952597c30: Well, I wish I could be more happy, but I've just had some bad news.
textByHash.ed6ceb9a04c2d751ec307248d3d8b23ded3a16bc: Well, it seems that my friend was even more desperate than I had originally realised. He's gone to hide away from the authorities in the wilderness...what a lunatic!
textByHash.edcc297de306747e4fe5eb7953454714ec2325e9: I've heard that he's wandered into the lava maze in the most dangerous part of the wilderness!
textByHash.f96975ae7fe7643988a7e2ac3d49a5d4327ed98d: Well, I was wondering if you could do me just one small favour? Please could you go and fetch him back again for me?
